titles.title: USMMA Athletics Act of 2026
USMMA Athletics Act of 2025
USMMA Athletics Act of 2026
A bill to support the athletic programs of the United States Merchant Marine Academy.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Reported by Senator Cruz with an amendment in the nature of a substitute. With written report No. 119-126.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 434.

committee.name: Senate Commerce, Science, and Transportation
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To

term.name: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
